message:
fix(e2e): set kc-has-session in mission-control-e2e tests (#10800)

The api.get() method checks hasToken() which returns false for
demo-token (it's treated as DEMO_TOKEN_VALUE sentinel). Without
kc-has-session=true, the fetch to /api/github/repos/.../contents
throws UnauthenticatedError before the Playwright route mock can
intercept it, causing all expandSampleRunbooks tests to fail.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
